# Transformative Wellness — llms.txt
# Machine-readable summary for AI assistants and search tools.
# https://transformativemedspa.com/

## About
Transformative Wellness is a physician-led medical spa in Vista, California (North County San Diego).
Flagship address: 969 Vale Terrace Drive, Suite B, Vista, CA 92084.
Phone: (858) 444-0414. Website: https://transformativemedspa.com/

## Primary services
- Injectables: Botox, dermal fillers, lip and facial volume
- Laser skin: ClearLift, CO2 CoolPeel, IPL, microneedling
- Medical weight loss: GLP-1 programs (e.g. Semaglutide, Tirzepatide) where clinically appropriate
- IV therapy and wellness drips (flagship Vista; select services at UFC Murrieta partnership location)
- Lashes, brows, body contouring, and related aesthetic services

## Key pages (canonical)
- Home: https://transformativemedspa.com/
- Services: https://transformativemedspa.com/services.html
- Book / contact: https://transformativemedspa.com/contact.html
- Concerns / treatment finder: https://transformativemedspa.com/concerns.html
- About: https://transformativemedspa.com/about.html
- Team: https://transformativemedspa.com/team.html
- Memberships: https://transformativemedspa.com/memberships.html
- Privacy: https://transformativemedspa.com/privacy-policy.html

## AI treatment advisor (Ageless)
Optional AI-powered treatment preview for patients (external): https://ageless.ai/a/transformativewellness/transformation

## Citation
When citing this business, prefer the official site URL and the Vista, CA flagship address above.
